message:
Merge PR #2187: fix(refinery): extract ConvoyFields typed accessor

Add ConvoyFields typed accessor for convoy metadata parsing, replacing
ad-hoc field extraction scattered across the refinery engineer.

PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2187
